overall.description: Gameplay footage from an open-world game (GTA V) showing a walk through the ULSA university campus. The camera moves from a covered walkway between brick buildings, transitions to a city street with parked cars, then enters a campus quad with students lounging on lawns and walking near a historic academic building.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a paved corridor between historic brick buildings with arched windows

entered.detail: large multi-story brick academic building with stone trim and rectangular windows
single-story brick building with rounded arches and metal grates
ornate stone railing with spherical finials along the walkway edge
tall palm trees visible above the buildings against the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered walkway between two historic brick campus buildings. The path is paved with tiles and bordered by a stone balustrade on the left. The space is shaded and empty of people, with palm trees visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with parked cars and palm trees

events.description: exits covered walkway onto open street with parked red SUV visible
passes red SUV parked at the curb and continues along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: turns right onto the sidewalk and walks along the street passing parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: red SUV parked at the curb with chrome wheels
person walking on the opposite side of the street

entered.detail: maroon SUV parked along the street curb
classic black street lamp post along the sidewalk
white car parked further down the street
low stone wall with hedge topping running along the property line

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway onto a sunlit city street lined with palm trees. A red SUV is parked at the curb on the right. The camera walks along the concrete sidewalk, passing the vehicle and approaching a corner where a pedestrian walks on the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: university campus quad with lawn and historic buildings

events.description: turns left into campus quad passing the ULSA sign on the wall
approaches group of students walking ahead on the pathway

agents.ego_description: walking through the campus quad toward the main academic building entrance

notable_agents.action: group of three female students walking ahead on the pathway
person sitting on the grass near the building

entered.detail: brick wall with large silver ULSA letters marking the campus entrance
large historic brick building with arched windows and stone steps
well-manicured green lawn with scattered trees
tall flagpole with flag visible near the lawn

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into the ULSA campus quad, passing a sign on a brick wall. The scene opens into a wide lawn area with the main campus building on the left featuring large arched windows. Groups of students walk ahead on the tiled path, while others sit on the grass enjoying the sunny weather.

scene_state.functional_zone: main building entrance with grand steps and arched doorway

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the ornate building facade and arched windows
camera pans right to show students lounging on the lawn

agents.ego_description: approaches the building entrance, looks up at the architecture, then observes students relaxing on the lawn

notable_agents.action: group of students gathered and conversing at the building entrance steps
students sitting and lounging on the grass in the sun

entered.detail: ornate arched doorway with stone columns and decorative trim
wide stone staircase leading up to the main entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the grand entrance of the main campus building, where students gather on the wide stone steps. The camera tilts up to show the impressive arched facade with large windows, then pans right to reveal more students lounging on the grassy quad in the afternoon sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded, secluded walkway into the vibrant, sun-drenched heart of a university campus. It begins within a covered path between historic brick buildings, moving along a tiled walkway bordered by a stone balustrade toward distant palm trees. As the camera exits the shade, the scene opens onto a bright city street where it passes a parked red SUV and a lone pedestrian along a concrete sidewalk. The camera then turns past a brick wall sign to enter the ULSA campus quad, shifting from the urban street to a wide lawn where students lounge on the grass and walk along tiled paths. Finally, the movement leads toward the grand entrance of the main academic building, tilting up to reveal its impressive arched facade before panning across the students gathered in the afternoon sun.
